static int printHelp ( int argc , char * argv [ ] ) {
 fprintf ( stderr , "Usage: %s [-options] [file_name]
" "
" "Read the files specified and
" "create a binary file [package-name]_[bundle-name]." DATA_TYPE " with the StringPrep profile data
" "
" , argv [ 0 ] ) ;
 fprintf ( stderr , "Options:
" "	-h or -? or --help print this usage text
" "	-v or --verbose verbose output
" "	-c or --copyright include a copyright notice
" ) ;
 fprintf ( stderr , "	-d or --destdir destination directory, followed by the path
" "	-s or --sourcedir source directory of ICU data, followed by the path
" "	-b or --bundle-name generate the ouput data file with the name specified
" "	-i or --icudatadir directory for locating any needed intermediate data files,
" "	 followed by path, defaults to %s
" , u_getDataDirectory ( ) ) ;
 fprintf ( stderr , "	-n or --normalize turn on the option for normalization and include mappings
" "	 from NormalizationCorrections.txt from the given path,
" "	 e.g: /test/icu/source/data/unidata
" ) ;
 fprintf ( stderr , "	-m or --norm-correction use NormalizationCorrections.txt from the given path
" "	 when the input file contains a normalization directive.
" "	 unlike -n/--normalize, this option does not force the
" "	 normalization.
" ) ;
 fprintf ( stderr , "	-k or --check-bidi turn on the option for checking for BiDi in the profile
" "	-u or --unicode version of Unicode to be used with this profile followed by the version
" ) ;
 return argc < 0 ? U_ILLEGAL_ARGUMENT_ERROR : U_ZERO_ERROR ;
 },0
